title: Luffy Knocks Down Alvida
description: On pages 12–15, this part follows Luffy and Coby aboard Alvida’s ship, where Coby’s fear begins turning into a dream of his own.
scene: Luffy’s arrival disrupts Alvida’s ship and gives Coby the first real chance to say what he wants.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: YOU'RE NOT EVEN AFRAID TO DIE!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And I believe I'll succeed, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OR V AM I JUST DE- LUDING MYSELF.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: I NEVER LOOKED AT IT LIKE 7HAT BEFORE!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: MAYBE... I CAN BE LIKE THAT!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: IF I'M WILLING TO RISK MY LIFE TRYING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: ...Maybe it's possible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you think I can join the Navy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THE NAVY!?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: We'll end up being enemies...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: But I want to join the navy and fight the bad guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: It's been my dream since I was a little kid!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Luffy! Do you think I can do it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How would I know?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Well, I'm gonna do it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: What've I got to lose!? I don't wanna be a miser- able cabin boy my whole life!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Better to risk my life trying to achieve my dream!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: I'll join the Navy... and then... I'll capture alvida!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: WHO are you going to CAPTURE I runt!?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Aaah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: MY BOAT!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: You little sneak!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Did you really think you could escape from me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is THAT the bounty hunter you hired? Well, he certainly isn't RORDOA 2010..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So I'll give you one chance to repent...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: WHO is the FAIREST through- out all the seas?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ANSVER ME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Zolo?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Heh heh heh heh heh...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: LADY ALVICA, YOU--

summary: Luffy’s confidence contrasts with Coby’s fear. The section is about Coby slowly realizing that his dream is possible once someone refuses to treat Alvida as unbeatable.
